requiredConsumerChecks: market and type equal the requested values
source and version are non-empty and accepted
asOf is not future-dated or older than the consumer maximum age
lineageHash and every observation hash are valid SHA-256 hex values

chainCore.interface: system module delivery of value, scale, asOf, policyVersion, quality, lineageHash
chainCore.ownerAction: implement consensus validation and governance activation

exchange.ownerAction: replace any venue-local price fact with validated Oracle responses

dex.ownerAction: publish confirmed pool observations and consume canonical values only where fiat/reference pricing is required

quant.ownerAction: preserve raw Exchange trades while switching cross-venue reference facts to Oracle

finance.ownerAction: validate source and quality before display or calculations

pay.ownerAction: bind quote expiry to asOf and fail closed on unsafe quality

stablecoin.ownerAction: keep price, reserve evidence, and mint/burn authority separate

explorerMonitor.ownerAction: display source lineage and alert on stale, divergence, breaker, correction, or provider changes

bridge.ownerAction: use validated values for limits/risk only under Bridge governance
